fields.name: Setup Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a price calculation setup code.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies what type of amount to calculate - sale or purchase.

fields.name: Source Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the prices come from groups of customers, vendors or projects.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique identifier of the source of the price on the price list line.

fields.name: Implementation
fields.tooltip: Specifies a price calculation implementation name.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the implementation codeunit is enabled.

fields.name: Assign-to No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique identifier of the source of the price on the price list line.
